overall.description: A cinematic aerial drone flight through Night City from Cyberpunk 2077, showcasing a futuristic cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and industrial structures. The camera moves smoothly forward above the urban landscape under a bright clear sky, transitioning from an industrial district into the dense central business district.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of industrial district approaching city center

agents.ego_description: flying forward through the urban landscape, observing the transition from industrial structures to the downtown skyline

entered.detail: massive industrial structure with distinctive yellow structural beams and archway framework
waterway running through the city center with multiple bridge crossings visible below
cluster of futuristic mega-towers with holographic displays dominating the skyline
raised highway or monorail track running parallel to the flight path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic cyberpunk city, featuring a massive industrial building with yellow structural elements on the left and a canal running through the center. The camera moves smoothly forward toward the distant central skyscrapers under bright sunlight, with holographic billboards visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between industrial and commercial districts

events.description: passing the industrial arch building and entering the central commercial district with colorful architecture
increasing density of holographic advertisements and smoke emissions from buildings becomes prominent

agents.ego_description: continuing forward flight while shifting slightly right to center on the downtown skyscrapers

entered.detail: building covered in bright psychedelic circular patterns and vibrant neon graffiti
multiple structures releasing white steam and smoke plumes into the air
tall vertical digital billboards attached to skyscrapers showing advertisements

segments.scene_description: The camera moves past the industrial structure on the left and a colorful graffiti-covered building enters the frame on the right. The scene transitions into the commercial heart of the city, with smoke-emitting buildings becoming visible and the central skyscrapers growing larger in the frame.

events.description: camera slightly descends and slows as it approaches the towering central skyscrapers
tall buildings on left and right temporarily narrow the field of view creating a canyon effect

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense urban canyon between towering structures, surrounded by holographic advertisements

entered.detail: massive skyscrapers completely covered in vertical holographic displays and digital signage
modern glass facade towers reflecting the sunlight on the left side of the flight path

segments.scene_description: The camera descends slightly as it enters the dense downtown canyon, with the central skyscrapers now dominating the near field. The view becomes partially enclosed by towering glass buildings on both sides, while holographic advertisements and smoke plumes fill the space between structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial progression from a sprawling industrial outskirts into the dense, towering canyon of a futuristic city center. It begins by gliding over a central canal and a massive industrial building with yellow structural elements, moving steadily toward distant skyscrapers under bright sunlight. As the camera passes the industrial zone, a graffiti-covered building enters the frame on the right while smoke-emitting structures signal the transition into the commercial heart of the metropolis. The scene then shifts as the camera descends slightly, allowing the central skyscrapers to dominate the view and enclose the space. Finally, the perspective becomes immersed in a downtown canyon of glass buildings, where holographic advertisements and plumes of smoke fill the gaps between the towering architecture.
